caption: The video begins with a view from an airplane window, showing the wing and engine of the aircraft as it sits on a sunny runway. A Real Madrid logo is visible in the upper right corner of the frame. The scene then transitions to the exterior of "GRANADA AIRPORT" at "12:08," as indicated by the on-screen text. Several men are present, including one wearing a grey t-shirt, dark pants, and a face mask, who is walking past a large team bus. The bus is white with blue accents and features prominent graphics and the Real Madrid crest. Another man in a light grey t-shirt and face mask walks alongside him. In the final sequence, a man wearing a white t-shirt and a backpack is seen entering the open door of the bus, while the others continue to move across the tarmac near a building.
